prefix.name: role
prefix.description: Role utility commands

prefix.name: info
prefix.description: Get details of a specific role.

prefix.name: ltc-notifier
prefix.description: Manage your LTC notifier

prefix.name: addy
prefix.description: Show your saved Litecoin address

prefix.name: set
prefix.description: Set your Litecoin address

prefix.name: change
prefix.description: Change your saved Litecoin address

prefix.name: delete
prefix.description: Delete your saved Litecoin address

prefix.name: qrcode
prefix.description: Generate various types of QR codes.

prefix.name: ltc
prefix.description: Create a QR for ltc addy

prefix.name: upi
prefix.description: Create a QR for UPI with optional amount

prefix.name: text
prefix.description: Create a QR with custom text

prefix.name: paypal
prefix.description: Create QR for PayPal

prefix.name: esewa
prefix.description: Create a QR for eSewa

prefix.name: url
prefix.description: Create a QR with custom URL

prefix.name: balance
prefix.description: Get crypto address balances

prefix.name: ltc
prefix.description: Get the balance of a ltc address.

prefix.name: eth
prefix.description: Get the balance of an eth address.

prefix.name: sol
prefix.description: Get the balance of a sol address.

prefix.name: export-commands
prefix.description: Export commands metadata to a JSON file.

prefix.name: ping
prefix.description: Check the bot's latency.

prefix.name: tinyurl
prefix.description: Shorten a URL using TinyURL

prefix.name: help
prefix.description: Shows this message

prefix.name: member
prefix.description: Member utility commands

prefix.name: info
prefix.description: Get information about a specific member.

prefix.name: jishaku
prefix.description:
The Jishaku debug and diagnostic commands.

This command on its own gives a status brief.
All other functionality is within its subcommands.

prefix.name: curl
prefix.description:
Download and display a text file from the internet.

This command is similar to jsk cat, but accepts a URL.

prefix.name: sync
prefix.description: Sync global or guild application commands to Discord.

prefix.name: py
prefix.description: Direct evaluation of Python code.

prefix.name: permtrace
prefix.description:
Calculates the source of granted or rejected permissions.

This accepts a channel, and either a member or a list of roles.
It calculates permissions the same way Discord does, while keeping track of the source.

prefix.name: retain
prefix.description:
Turn variable retention for REPL on or off.

Provide no argument for current status.

prefix.name: ast
prefix.description: Disassemble Python code into AST.

prefix.name: py_inspect
prefix.description: Evaluation of Python code with inspect information.

prefix.name: dis
prefix.description: Disassemble Python code into bytecode.

prefix.name: specialist
prefix.description: Direct evaluation of Python code.

prefix.name: voice
prefix.description:
Voice-related commands.

If invoked without subcommand, relays current voice state.

prefix.name: resume
prefix.description: Resumes a running audio source, if there is one.

prefix.name: join
prefix.description:
Joins a voice channel, or moves to it if already connected.

Passing a voice channel uses that voice channel.
Passing a member will use that member's current voice channel.
Passing nothing will use the author's voice channel.

prefix.name: volume
prefix.description: Adjusts the volume of an audio source if it is supported.

prefix.name: disconnect
prefix.description: Disconnects from the voice channel in this guild, if there is one.

prefix.name: stop
prefix.description: Stops running an audio source, if there is one.

prefix.name: pause
prefix.description: Pauses a running audio source, if there is one.

prefix.name: play
prefix.description:
Plays audio direct from a URI.

Can be either a local file or an audio resource on the internet.

prefix.name: pip
prefix.description: Shortcut for 'jsk sh pip'. Invokes the system shell.

prefix.name: shell
prefix.description:
Executes statements in the system shell.

This uses the system shell as defined in $SHELL, or `/bin/bash` otherwise.
Execution can be cancelled by closing the paginator.

prefix.name: node
prefix.description: Shortcut for scaffolding and executing 'npm run'. Only exists if the executables are detected.

prefix.name: git
prefix.description: Shortcut for 'jsk sh git'. Invokes the system shell.

prefix.name: override
prefix.description:
Run a command with a different user, channel, or thread, optionally bypassing checks and cooldowns.

Users will try to resolve to a Member, but will use a User if it can't find one.

prefix.name: sql
prefix.description: Parent for SQL adapter related commands

prefix.name: fetch
prefix.description: Fetch multiple rows from the SQL database.

prefix.name: select
prefix.description: Shortcut for 'jsk sql fetch select'.

prefix.name: fetchrow
prefix.description: Fetch a single row from the SQL database.

prefix.name: execute
prefix.description: Executes a statement against the SQL database.

prefix.name: schema
prefix.description: Queries for the current schema and shows located table structures.

prefix.name: show
prefix.description: Shows Jishaku in the help command.

prefix.name: hide
prefix.description: Hides Jishaku from the help command.

prefix.name: rerun
prefix.description:
Re-run a command from a replied message or message link, optionally with a different user, channel or thread and/or bypassing checks and cooldowns

Users will try to resolve to a Member, but will use a User if it can't find one.

Piggybacks off of `jsk override` so it accepts all the same overrides and has the same fundamental behaviors.

prefix.name: unload
prefix.description:
Unloads the given extension names.

Reports any extensions that failed to unload.

prefix.name: debug
prefix.description: Run a command timing execution and catching exceptions.

prefix.name: tasks
prefix.description: Shows the currently running jishaku tasks.

prefix.name: repeat
prefix.description:
Runs a command multiple times in a row.

This acts like the command was invoked several times manually, so it obeys cooldowns.
You can use this in conjunction with `jsk sudo` to bypass this.

prefix.name: cancel
prefix.description:
Cancels a task with the given index.

If the index passed is -1, will cancel the last task instead.

prefix.name: load
prefix.description:
Loads or reloads the given extension names.

Reports any extensions that failed to load.

prefix.name: shutdown
prefix.description: Logs this bot out.

prefix.name: invite
prefix.description:
Retrieve the invite URL for this bot.

If the names of permissions are provided, they are requested as part of the invite.

prefix.name: source
prefix.description: Displays the source code for a command.

prefix.name: cat
prefix.description:
Read out a file, using syntax highlighting if detected.

Lines and linespans are supported by adding '#L12' or '#L12-14' etc to the end of the filename.

prefix.name: rtt
prefix.description: Calculates Round-Trip Time to the API.

prefix.name: reminder
prefix.description: Manage reminders

prefix.name: create
prefix.description: Create a new reminder

prefix.name: nuke
prefix.description: Nuke all your reminders

prefix.name: delete
prefix.description: Delete a reminder

prefix.name: list
prefix.description: List your reminders

prefix.name: twitter
prefix.description: Embed an X.com post.

prefix.name: channel
prefix.description: Channel utility commands

prefix.name: info
prefix.description: Get information about a specific channel.

prefix.name: server
prefix.description: Server utility commands

prefix.name: info
prefix.description: Get information about the server.

prefix.name: stats
prefix.description: Show bot resource usage.

prefix.name: thumbnail
prefix.description: Fetch the youtube video thumnail.

prefix.name: instagram
prefix.description: Embed an Instagram reel or post.

prefix.name: restart
prefix.description: Restart the bot (owner only).

prefix.name: price
prefix.description:
Get the price of a cryptocurrency.
Examples: ,price btc | ,price bitcoin | ,price eth

prefix.name: tiktok
prefix.description: Embed a TikTok video.

app.description: Generate various types of QR codes.

params.description: The text to encode in the QR code (max 200 characters).

params.name: upi_id
params.description: The UPI ID to encode in the QR code.

params.name: amount
params.description: The amount to include in the UPI QR code (optional).

params.name: note
params.description: A note to include in the UPI QR code (optional, max 100 characters).

app.name: url

params.description: The YouTube video URL to fetch the thumbnail from.
